footer.subtagline: Free automotive education for women, immigrants, and first-time buyers.
footer.copyright: © 2026 VINdicated. All rights reserved. Founded by Rana Darwich.
footer.mission: A nonprofit committed to gender equity in automotive commerce.

meta.defaultDescription: VINdicated is a nonprofit built on the belief that car knowledge should be public knowledge. We break down the systems that allow consumer discrimination to thrive.

home.title: Educate. Empower. Vindicate.
home.description: VINdicated is a free nonprofit helping car buyers navigate dealerships without being taken advantage of. Free guides, research, and know-your-rights resources.

about.title: About Us
about.description: VINdicated was founded by Rana Darwich after experiencing dealership discrimination firsthand. Learn about our mission to educate, empower, and vindicate car buyers.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the people behind VINdicated: advocates, researchers, and students fighting dealership discrimination.

inspection.title: Inspection Guide
inspection.description: A step-by-step guide to inspecting a used car before you buy. Know what to look for under the hood, on the lot, and in the paperwork.

fraud.title: Fraud Prevention
fraud.description: Learn to recognize and counter common dealer scams. Know the red flags, your legal rights under California and federal law, and what to do if you've been scammed.

documents.title: Documents Decoded
documents.description: Interactive guides to understanding car buying documents: the pink slip, Carfax reports, financing contracts, and more. Know what you're signing before you sign it.

research.title: Research
research.description: VINdicated conducts correspondence audit studies documenting gender and racial pricing disparities at car dealerships. Read our findings and methodology.

rights.title: Know Your Rights
rights.description: Know your legal rights as a car buyer. Federal and California laws protect you from discrimination and deceptive practices at dealerships.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with VINdicated: volunteer with our team, share your story, participate in research, or partner with us.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.description: Apply to join VINdicated as a student volunteer, researcher, engineer, designer, or outreach contributor.

hero.subtitle: VINdicated is built on the belief that car knowledge should be public knowledge. We break down the systems that allow consumer discrimination to thrive through education, research, and community.

pillars.title: Pre-Purchase Inspection Guide
pillars.body: A step-by-step walkthrough of everything you should check, ask, and verify before handing over a dollar. Written for first-time buyers.
pillars.label: Read the Guide

pillars.title: Fraud Prevention
pillars.body: Real tactics used against buyers, named, explained, and countered. Know exactly what to say when a dealer tries to pressure you.
pillars.label: Spot the Red Flags

quote.text: Why should woman be kept in ignorance under the specious name of innocence?
quote.source: A Vindication of the Rights of Woman (1792)

founder.body1: Three strikes at three different dealerships showed me the same thing: the system is designed to confuse you, rush you, and profit off what you don't know.
founder.body2Bold: I wish it had existed for me.

meta.title: Educate. Empower. Vindicate.
meta.description: VINdicated is a free nonprofit helping car buyers navigate dealerships without being taken advantage of. Free guides, research, and know-your-rights resources.

hero.titlePlain: Built on the belief that car knowledge
hero.subtitle: VINdicated exists because we do not believe women should have to bring male protection just to buy a car safely.

para1.text: Research by Ian Ayres and Peter Siegelman found that
Black male car buyers were quoted prices averaging $1,100 higher
than white male buyers for identical cars, even when using identical bargaining scripts. Black women were quoted $410 more than white men. White women were quoted $92 more than white men.

para2.text: 48% of Gen Z women feel discouraged from visiting a dealership
due to concern about gender-based discrimination (Morning Consult for Caribou, 2022). This isn't paranoia. This is pattern recognition.

para3.text: Dealers made racist or sexist comments in

whyWeExist.para4: And we're done pretending it's isolated incidents.

mission.heading: Educate. Empower.
mission.subheading: To dismantle consumer-level escort culture, one informed buyer at a time.

pillars.body: Make car buying understandable. Navigable. We translate the dealer playbook into plain language because knowledge is leverage.
Build the confidence to walk in alone, ask the right questions, and walk away when necessary without shame, without needing backup.
Produce the research that documents what consumers already know. Turn lived experience into data. Turn data into policy change.

story.subtitle: Three strikes. Three completely different situations. The same system every time.

strikes.label: The Pink Slip Scam
body: At 18, I was trying to buy a car from my friend's dad. He made me wait three months, promising the whole time to sell it to me.
When the time finally came, he tried to tell me I didn't need the pink slip. He was trying to scam me. Without the title in your name, the car is not legally yours, no matter what you paid.

strikes.label: Facebook Marketplace
body: I tried buying a car on Facebook Marketplace. The conversation started normally with mileage, price, when I could come look.
As soon as he found out I was female, the tone shifted completely. He told me, "Shut your mouth, bitch," and blocked me.

strikes.label: South Coast Mitsubishi
body: I showed up to test drive a car alone. When I came back with my sister to buy it, it suddenly read: "Buy today or lose it."
Then I paid for an independent inspection. They found issues. They handed me a financing contract at 30% APR. I know what a bad deal is. I didn't sign.

pullquote.quote: I reported Eddy. When the GM called to apologize, I said: I do not accept your apology. I hope whether a 19-year-old girl or a 50-year-old man walks in, you will treat everyone with respect.

bio.label: About the Founder
bio.body: Rana Darwich founded VINdicated at 19 after almost signing a predatory arbitration clause at a dealership.

wollstonecraft.label: Mary Wollstonecraft, 1792
wollstonecraft.quote: Strengthen the female mind by enlarging it, and there will be an end to blind obedience.

provide.subtitle: Everything VINdicated offers is free. No signup required, no upsell, no catch.

items.title: Free Automotive Workshops
items.body: Community-led sessions breaking down what dealers do not want you to know including financing, repairs, and your legal rights on the lot.

items.title: Online Resources & Guides
items.body: Step-by-step inspection guides, red flag checklists, script templates, and financing explainers. Designed for first-time buyers.

items.title: Vetted Mechanic Network
items.body: We're building a directory of mechanics vetted by our community: honest mechanics who do not talk down to you, do not upsell you.

items.title: Correspondence Audit Studies
items.body: We document discrimination with data. Our ongoing studies quantify gender-based pricing disparities.
